author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ C4 PTR Release + New Promotional Sale + Crew Pack Snapshot! , To celebrate the release of the C4 PTR, we are running a promotional sale featuring brand-new, highly anticipated Star Atlas assets. The promotion will run for exactly 2 weeks or until the limited listings are depleted. We will run a snapshot of all those who purchased the assets during the campaign period and send them the bonus crew packs after the two weeks have passed. #1 CULTIVATION CLAIMS (TIERS 1-5) Cultivation Claims represent the pinnacle of interspecies collaboration by CARY. State-of-the-art planetary structures designed to harness the galaxy's most elusive crops, resilient plants, and exotic herbs. By unlocking the unique properties of exotic flora, these installations transform barren worlds into high-yield agricultural hubs, ensuring that no matter how harsh the frontier, your people will thrive. Here are the available tiers and their crew pack bonuses: Tier 1: $15 // 1,337 units // 1x silver 1 crew pack , Tier 2: $75 // 400 units // 3x gold 1 crew pack , Tier 3: $274 // 128 units // 1x platinum 5 crew pack , Tier 4: $639 // 62 units // 2x platinum 5 crew pack + 1x gold 5 crew pack , Tier 5: $1,970 // 25 units // 6x platinum 5 crew pack , | Get it here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/CULTyJq7cqCyTxcReRffiGgv3XrKJCfBhYVVrkdNVgSV/?symbol=ATLAS #2 VZUS ARMA RELEASE Born in the turbulent aftermath of the Convergence War, the Arma is a small fighter vessel commissioned by the Winter Fist Sect. Now fully integrated into the Ustur fleet, it serves as a stark reminder: while the Ustur seek enlightenment through peace, they are perfectly capable of finding truth in combat and destruction. Pricing and bonuses: VZUS Arma: $81 // 185 units // 3x gold 1 crew pack , | Get it here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/VZA31QjDrGs6rEXZs6JN2shsG6GbWZZst51qUHNvNnX/ #3 CALICO FLATTOP LAUNCH A behemoth of heavy logistics. This capital freighter utilizes a revolutionary magnetic pulse to secure cargo, ensuring flawless transit without disturbing even the frailest goods. Equipped with an atmospheric generation shield to protect hauls from deep-space radiation, it embodies Calico’s philosophy of strength through commerce. Pricing and bonuses: Calico Flattop: $3,050 // 20 units // 12x platinum 5 crew pack , @everyone | Get it here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/CALHEsUGywdyXybMi3DAUgWCNZwxP55Wj2Ean8wXqho4/
